title: Implement `Op_File.Actions.FileAction_Symlink`
body:
Tackles the `Op_File.Actions.FileAction_Symlink` item from #6732 

- Add `copier.Symlink()`, possibly just creating an in-memory buffer and feeding it to `copier.Put()`
- Add unit test to the copier package

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
Still planning to implement, not stale
